pricing.meta.title: Pricing
pricing.meta.description: Free forever for small clubs. Upgrade a single event for $39, or go Pro at $20/month for unlimited competitions, entry fees, and realtime scoreboards. 14-day trial, no card required.
pricing.title: Pay for the event, or the whole season
pricing.subhead: Free for small clubs. One-time Event Pass for the yearly tournament. Pro when you run competitions all year.
pricing.community.name: Community
pricing.pass.name: Event Pass
pricing.pass.note: One-time. No subscription. Yours for the event's lifetime.
pricing.plus.name: Pro Plus
pricing.plus.teaser: Need more scale? Unlimited seats, a 1% platform fee, AI-assisted scheduling and auto officials.
pricing.matrix.fees: Entry fees paid out to your club
pricing.enterprise.text: Need more than Pro — federations, leagues at scale, SSO?
pricing.faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
pricing.faq.card.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricing.faq.card.a: No. The Community plan is free forever and requires no payment details. The Pro trial also starts without a card.
pricing.faq.eventPass.q: What exactly does an Event Pass cover?
pricing.faq.eventPass.a: One competition, for its lifetime. That competition gets 10 divisions, 32 entrants per division, advanced formats, entry fees, branding, exports and realtime — and it stops counting against your free active-competition slot. Other competitions in your org stay on Community limits.
pricing.faq.upgraded.q: I bought an Event Pass and later went Pro — what happens?
pricing.faq.upgraded.a: Pro covers everything the pass does, org-wide, so the pass sits dormant. If you ever cancel Pro, passed competitions stay upgraded — passes never expire.
pricing.faq.trialEnd.q: What happens when my Pro trial or subscription ends?
pricing.faq.trialEnd.a: Your org drops back to Community limits automatically. Nothing is deleted — competitions over the limit become read-only until you archive down to quota or upgrade again.
pricing.faq.fees.a: Yes — with an Event Pass (5% platform fee on that competition) or on Pro (2% org-wide). Connect your club's Stripe account and fees from online registration are paid out directly to the club. Free-event registration works on every plan.
pricing.faq.currencies.q: Which currencies can I pay in?
pricing.faq.currencies.a: USD, EUR, GBP, INR and AUD — use the switcher above. Your first checkout pins the currency for future renewals.
pricing.faq.annual.a: Yes — annual billing is two months free (17% off), and it's the default on the Pro card above.
pricing.faq.cancel.a: Yes. Cancel from Settings → Billing. Your Pro access continues until the end of the billing period.
pricing.faq.proPlus.a: Everything in Pro, plus unlimited seats and scale, a 1% platform fee, AI-assisted scheduling, auto officials assignment, write API access and priority support. Pro stays $20/mo; Pro Plus is $39/mo or $390/yr.
pricing.final.title: Start for free today
pricing.final.subhead: No card required. Upgrade a single event, or the whole club, when it grows.

formats.meta.title: Tournament formats — round robin, knockout, groups, swiss, americano | Seazn Club
formats.meta.description: Every tournament format explained — round robin leagues, knockout brackets, groups + knockout, swiss, double elimination, americano and ladders — with diagrams, real examples and a free generator.
formats.h1: Every format, explained — then generated for you
formats.subhead: Round robin, knockout, groups, swiss, americano — pick a shape below to see how it works, then let seazn.club build the fixtures, run the scoring and share the live standings.
formats.cta.title: Stop drawing brackets by hand
formats.cta.body: Pick a format, paste your entrants, and the fixtures, scoring and live standings are done. Free for small clubs.
useCases.clubs.metaTitle: For Sports Clubs & Academies — Seazn Club
useCases.clubs.metaDesc: Run weekly round-robins, seasonal championships, and internal ladders across chess, carrom, badminton, and more — all in one platform.
useCases.clubs.subhead: Whether you run weekly internal leagues or annual championships, Seazn Club handles the draw, standings, and results — so you can spend your time coaching, not counting points.
useCases.clubs.cta.title: Set up your club in under 5 minutes
useCases.clubs.card.0.title: Seasonal structure
useCases.clubs.card.0.body: Group your tournaments into named seasons. Track cumulative performance across the year and compare results across different cohorts.
useCases.clubs.card.1.title: Multiple formats
useCases.clubs.card.1.body: Run a Swiss group stage into knockout final, or a pure round-robin points table. Mix formats across different age groups or skill levels.
useCases.clubs.card.2.title: Multiple staff, one org
useCases.clubs.card.2.body: Add coaches as admins to create and manage tournaments. Invite parents and members as viewers to follow results in real time.
useCases.clubs.card.3.title: Multi-sport support
useCases.clubs.card.3.body: Chess, carrom, football, cricket, badminton, table tennis — configure custom scoring rules and clocks per sport with preset templates.
useCases.clubs.card.4.title: Print & display
useCases.clubs.card.4.body: Export the bracket or standings to print for the noticeboard, or run the slideshow view on a club-room screen.
useCases.clubs.card.5.title: Undo & corrections
useCases.clubs.card.5.body: Results can be corrected before the next round. Undo tokens give you a safety net without disrupting the flow.
useCases.events.metaDesc: One-day open tournaments, charity cups, local derbies. Set up in 5 minutes and run all day without a hitch.
useCases.events.subhead: Open tournaments, charity cups, corporate events — set up the draw in five minutes before doors open, then record results from any device throughout the day.
useCases.events.cta.title: Run your next event without the spreadsheet
useCases.events.card.0.title: Ready before kickoff
useCases.events.card.0.body: Add players, choose format (Swiss, Knockout, or both), configure rounds, and you're live. Takes under 5 minutes for 32 entrants.
useCases.events.card.1.title: Record results on any device
useCases.events.card.1.body: Results are recorded from any phone or tablet. The bracket and standings update instantly for everyone watching.
useCases.events.card.2.title: Handles odd numbers
useCases.events.card.2.body: Byes, walkovers, and odd player counts are managed automatically. No manual bracket editing required.
useCases.events.card.3.title: From group stage to final
useCases.events.card.3.body: Swiss Knockout format runs a round-robin group stage then auto-seeds into a knockout bracket — ideal for open events.
useCases.events.card.4.title: Live slideshow
useCases.events.card.4.body: Project the live standings or current bracket on a screen for spectators. Full-screen, auto-updating, no login needed on the display device.
useCases.events.card.5.title: Print the results
useCases.events.card.5.body: Print the final standings and bracket to hand out to participants or post on the venue board.
useCases.schools.metaTitle: For Schools & Youth Programs — Seazn Club
useCases.schools.metaDesc: Inter-house competitions, lunchtime leagues, end-of-term championships. Simple enough for students to use; powerful enough for school sports coordinators.
useCases.schools.h1: Tournaments that kids love to follow
useCases.schools.subhead: Inter-house tournaments, lunchtime chess leagues, sports day competitions — Seazn Club keeps students engaged with live standings they can check from anywhere, and makes the coordinator's job easy.
useCases.schools.cta.title: Get your school started for free
useCases.schools.cta.subtext: Community plan handles up to 32 players and 5 seasons — enough for most schools.
useCases.schools.card.0.title: Inter-house & inter-year
useCases.schools.card.0.body: Create separate tournament brackets per house or year group. Track points across the full term to crown a seasonal champion.
useCases.schools.card.1.title: Students follow on their phones
useCases.schools.card.1.body: Share a link to the live standings. Students can check results and standings without creating an account.
useCases.schools.card.2.title: Lunchtime leagues
useCases.schools.card.2.body: Run a rolling round-robin where each pair plays one match per week. Standings auto-update as matches are recorded.
useCases.schools.card.3.title: Multiple sports, one org
useCases.schools.card.3.body: Chess, carrom, table tennis, badminton — run all your school sports from a single organization with custom presets per sport.
useCases.schools.card.4.title: Noticeboard-ready
useCases.schools.card.4.body: Print the bracket or standings directly from the app. Looks great on A3 for the sports hall notice board.
useCases.schools.card.5.title: Staff-level access control
useCases.schools.card.5.body: PE staff and form tutors can be added as admins. Headteachers can view results without editing access.

live.meta.description: Every public match being scored on Seazn Club right now — live scores from clubs, leagues and one-day events.
live.subhead: Every public match being scored on Seazn Club at this moment — straight from courtside phones. Scores update by themselves.
live.browsePre: Looking for a whole competition, not one match?

discover.meta.description: Live and upcoming community tournaments running on Seazn Club — cricket, football, volleyball, chess, carrom and more. Follow live scores, or run your own.
discover.subhead: Live and upcoming competitions run by clubs on Seazn Club. Every one of them set up in minutes — yours could be here too.
discover.cta.title: Run your own tournament
discover.cta.body: Any sport, any format — free for community clubs.
discover.sport.empty: No public {nameLower} tournaments right now — yours could be the first.
discover.sport.metaTitle: {name} tournament software — live {nameLower} tournaments | Seazn Club
discover.sport.metaDesc: Run {nameLower} tournaments in minutes and follow live {nameLower} competitions on Seazn Club.
discover.sport.genericIntro: Run {nameLower} tournaments in minutes — any format, live scores included.
discover.sport.genericDetail: Set up a {nameLower} competition in minutes: automatic draws for Swiss, round-robin, groups and knockouts, live scoring from any device, and standings that update themselves.
discover.sport.copy.cricket.intro: Run cricket tournaments with ball-by-ball scoring, NRR standings and DLS support.
discover.sport.copy.cricket.detail: From tape-ball weekend cups to league seasons: T20/ODI-style variants, over-by-over scoring, net run rate computed for you, and live scorecards your players can share. Swiss, round-robin, groups and knockouts — all formats included.
discover.sport.copy.football.intro: Run football tournaments with live scores, group stages and knockout brackets.
discover.sport.copy.football.detail: Five-a-side nights, school cups, club leagues. Goal-by-goal timelines, W-D-L tables with goal difference, penalty shootouts, and shareable live pages for every match.
discover.sport.copy.volleyball.intro: Run volleyball tournaments with set-by-set scoring and ratio-based standings.
discover.sport.copy.volleyball.detail: Indoor or beach: best-of sets, rally scoring, set and point ratios in the standings, and live set boxes spectators can follow from their phones.
discover.sport.copy.badminton.intro: Run badminton tournaments with rally scoring and instant draws.
discover.sport.copy.badminton.detail: Singles, doubles, club ladders. Rally-by-rally or quick winner entry, automatic draws for any entrant count, and live courtside scoreboards.
discover.sport.copy.tabletennis.intro: Run table tennis tournaments with game-by-game scoring and any format.
discover.sport.copy.tabletennis.detail: Office leagues to open championships: best-of games, group-to-knockout progressions, and standings that update the moment a result lands.
discover.sport.copy.boardgame.intro: Run chess and board game tournaments with Swiss pairings and tiebreak cascades.
discover.sport.copy.boardgame.detail: Swiss rounds with Buchholz and Sonneborn-Berger computed for you, round-robin and knockout options, and live results your players can check between rounds.
discover.sport.copy.carrom.intro: Run carrom tournaments with board scoring and league or knockout play.
discover.sport.copy.carrom.detail: Club nights and community championships: board-by-board scoring, sport-correct standings, and live results on a shareable page.
live.wall.emptyTitle: No one's under the floodlights right now
live.wall.emptyBody: Public matches appear here the moment a scorer records the first point. Check what's coming up instead — or put your own club on this wall.
sched.board.status.initial: Tap a fixture, then tap a court. Two on one court = clash.
sched.board.status.clash: Clash! Two fixtures on Court {court} — the real board blocks publish until you fix it.
sched.board.status.full: Board full and clash-free — publish it.
sched.board.status.placed: Placed. Drop two on one court to see clash detection.
sched.board.replayCaption: 08:55 — FIXTURES ARRIVE · CLASH CAUGHT · RESOLVED · PUBLISHED — TOUCH TO TAKE OVER
